title: Assistant Store Manager - Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates!
